messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I recently bought a digital camera from your store, but it doesn’t zoom in as much as I was hoping. I use it mainly for bird-watching, so I really need something with the maximum zoom possible. I’d like to exchange it for a camera with the highest zoom capacity you have, but I want all the other features to stay the same. Can you help me with this? I’d also like the exchange to be done as quickly as possible.
